reason: Verified that agent successfully executes browser commands, navigates to https://example.com, and retrieves the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with sidebar containing list of agents
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260504-180107-keuc" in sidebar — Agent interface opened with chat window and message input box
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into input box — Message successfully entered into the input field
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", and task "Browser Page Title Retrieval Task" appeared in sidebar
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received successfully in approximately 8 seconds, showing two completed tool calls: "Open Browser" and "Browser Command $ get title"

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly displays "The page title is Example Domain." confirming successful browser navigation and title retrieval. Live browser preview on right side shows actual Example Domain webpage content
